name: Rajesh Sharma
text: Excellent value for money! Clean rooms, friendly staff, and very close to Maa Sharda Temple. Perfect for our pilgrimage visit. Highly recommended!

name: Priya Verma
text: Great stay near the railway station. The AC room was comfortable and the 24-hour staff was very helpful. Will definitely come back when visiting Maihar again!

name: Arun Patel
text: Budget-friendly, clean, and convenient location. Stayed here with my family. Rooms are spacious enough for our needs. Good breakfast too!

name: Meera Joshi
text: Had a wonderful experience! The staff is courteous and helpful. Rooms are clean and well-maintained. Great for temple visitors and travelers alike.

name: Vikram Singh
text: Really nice stay! Good location near railway station. Parking was convenient for my bike. Will stay again on my next trip to Maihar.

name: Deepa Gupta
text: Outstanding service! Our group of 8 stayed comfortably in the multi-bed rooms. The staff accommodated all our requests. Perfect for group pilgrimage tours!
